Total studies (7), participants (3,116), and study characteristics (ankle surgery, hip/knee arthroplasty) are reported.
Results include OR=0.59, 95% CI (0.34, 1.03), subgroup analyses with effect sizes and p-values provided.
No explicit summary of evidence limitations such as study risk of bias, inconsistency, or imprecision.
